BUSINESS GLOSSARY — SMOKE TEST
================================

Customer
--------
A Customer is an individual or organisation that has placed at least one
confirmed order on the platform. A Customer has a unique identifier,
a full name, an email address, and a region code.

Product
-------
A Product is a sellable item offered on the platform. Each Product has a
stock-keeping unit (SKU), a name, and a unit price. A Product belongs to
exactly one Category.

Order
-----
An Order records the agreement between the platform and a Customer to
supply one or more Products at specified quantities and prices. An Order
has a status (PENDING, CONFIRMED, SHIPPED, DELIVERED, CANCELLED) and a
total amount.
